name: Marriott Bonvoy Bountiful® Credit Card

welcome_offer.description: 85,000 bonus points after spending $4,000 in first 3 months

earning_rates.notes: 4x points at gas stations, Costco, and wholesale clubs

other_benefits.name: Automatic Gold Elite Status
other_benefits.description: Marriott Bonvoy Gold Elite status (25% bonus on earned points, complimentary upgrades, late checkout, and more)

other_benefits.name: 15 Elite Night Credits
other_benefits.description: 15 qualifying nights toward higher Marriott elite status each year

other_benefits.name: Priority Pass Select
other_benefits.description: Unlimited Priority Pass Select lounge access (2,000+ lounges)

other_benefits.name: Enhanced Reservation Availability
other_benefits.description: Access to exclusive reservation availability at Marriott properties

notes: $250 AF card positioned between Boundless and the premium Bonvoy Brilliant. The $300 annual Marriott credit essentially offsets the AF. Gold Elite status + Priority Pass Select makes it valuable. Earning rates are strong (4x on dining/gas/grocery). Best for heavy Marriott guests who want elevated status without the $650 AF on Bonvoy Brilliant.
